body:
## Summary
- Expand the self-awareness prompt cluster requested on PR 234 across issues #137, #139, #141, #142, #146, #147, #148, #155, and #237.
- Route Russian self-introduction, known-facts/world-knowledge, LLM/OpenAI/world-model/working-principle, project-purpose, and conversation-topic prompts before unknown or article fallbacks.
- Mirror the Rust solver behavior in the web worker and local browser fallback, including assistant-name configuration status in self-facts.
- Add the PR 234 case study and raw issue/PR evidence under `docs/case-studies/pull-request-234/`.

Fixes #146
Addresses #137, #139, #141, #142, #147, #148, #155, #237

## Tests
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `git diff --check`
- `node --check src/web/formal_ai_worker.js`
- `node --check src/web/app.js`
- `cargo test issue_146 --test unit`
- `cargo test --test unit`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `cargo test --all-features --verbose`
- `GITHUB_BASE_REF=main npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:language-test-coverage`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs` (warning-band files only, no violations)
- `rust-script scripts/check-changelog-fragment.rs`
- `cargo run --quiet -- chat --prompt 'Поговорим о бытие'`

## Notes
- Local Playwright e2e was not rerun in this workspace because `node_modules` is absent; the web worker and browser fallback files were syntax-checked and mirrored from the Rust regression coverage.
- Case study: `docs/case-studies/pull-request-234/README.md`
title: Expand self-awareness prompt coverage
